distinctive_elements: VGA graphics and sound card audio integration

notes: T2 data tier - empirical/qualitative only. Wikipedia source contains minimal audio documentation. No tempo, key, chord progression, time signature, or area-specific track data available. Only Adlib sound effects count (150+) documented. No SFX characteristics per character or area breakdown documented. Composer Paul S. Mudra credited for PC/MS-DOS version; alternative composers listed for platform variants (Yuzo Koshiro/Shinji Hosoe for PC-98; Yuzo Koshiro/Motohiro Kawashima for Sega CD).
